name: Mild left drift (synthetic)
description: Synthetic drift profile for testing. Models a robot with a mild leftward drift — the opposite direction of the measured Freenove unit. Useful for verifying that the VOR calibration and LightMemory work for both drift directions.
notes: Synthetic profile. Positive yaw = counterclockwise = leftward drift. Mirror image of the measured Freenove profile. Tests that the system is direction-agnostic.
